source: Mirrored from .claude/skills/lootfilter/parser/src/types.ts POE2_CLASSES (verified 2026-05-24, POE2 0.4 corpus). Re-verify at 0.5 launch.
notes: POE2 0.3+ removed the concept of socketable runes inside gear slots that POE1 has — 'Augment' is the umbrella class covering Soul Cores + Ancient Runes + Mythical Runes + Meta Crafting Runes + Runic Ward Runes.
WaystoneTier range is 1-16 (T16 only via corruption of T15).
Tablet is singular (not 'Tablets') — exact match required in filter Class condition.
POE2 has Pinnacle Keys (boss access) + Vault Keys (Trial of the Sekhemas vault) as separate classes — both should be Show'd unconditionally.

0.5 'Runes of Aldur' (~2026-05-29) may introduce new classes — common candidates: 'Remnant' (the Runic Recipe slate item), Kalguuran-specific skill/support gem subclasses. Re-verify POE2_CLASSES against parser/src/types.ts after 0.5 sample filter is published on poe2filter.com.
